title: "I'LL SIGN IT NEXT WEEK" — 2 YEARS LATER, NO EO EVER FILED
title_alt: AXIOS HBO OCT 30, 2018 — THE BIRTHRIGHT EO THAT NEVER CAME
8 DAYS BEFORE MIDTERMS, A PROMISE. THEN SILENCE.
description:
October 30, 2018 — eight days before the midterms — Axios on HBO interview. Direct quote: "I will sign it next week." The executive order ending birthright citizenship was never filed. The 14th Amendment was never challenged.

The White House EO archive shows zero matching filings across the entire term. The book grades it BROKEN on the next-week claim.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=birthright

#politics #immigration #trump #shorts #factcheck
